codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review confirmed the portal/auth follow-up restored the intended API contracts without widening access: `DealerService` again emits the standard structured error envelope for dealer read misses, the auth boundary tests keep the audit-specific denial path observable, and `docs/approvals/R2-CHECKPOINT.md` records the carried auth/company/RBAC hardening evidence. The changes are narrowly aligned to the review thread, so the packet passes on reachable commit `8fa09f3e15a7ceb232f78f7ea36d4d362e6e7d7c` (`fix(portal): restore dealer error and audit denial contracts`).

summary: Pass. Dealer error envelopes and audit-specific denial contracts were restored cleanly on commit `8fa09f3e15a7ceb232f78f7ea36d4d362e6e7d7c`.
